<h2> About Me </h2>

<img align="left" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="300" alt="mekyrus dark art"/>

```cpp
Profile Version : 1.0
---------------------
Name      : Aryan Sinha
Alias     : mekyrus
Class     : AI-Augmented Developer
OS        : Linux / Windows
Shell     : Bash / Zsh
Terminal  : VS Code / Alacritty

Stack:
  - Python (primary weapon)
  - LLMs (Claude, OpenAI, LangChain)
  - Server Infra (Nginx, VPS, Docker)
  - Automation Pipelines

Interests:
  - AI & LLM Engineering
  - Backend / DevOps
  - Prompt Engineering

-----------------------------------
"Those who see with the mind will
 always see beyond those who only
 rely on their eyes."
```

<h3>⚡ Top Projects <em>(built to avoid manual labor)</em></h3>

| Project | What It Does | Stack |
|---------|-------------|-------|
| 🤖 **AI Automation Pipelines** | LLM agent chains replacing hours of manual work | `Python` `LangChain` `Claude API` |
| 🌐 **Self-Hosted Server Infra** | VPS, Nginx reverse proxy, zero-downtime deploys | `Linux` `Nginx` `Docker` `VPS` |
| 📡 **RAG Document Agents** | AI that reads, indexes, answers from your files | `Python` `OpenAI` `FAISS` |
| ⚙️ **Automation Scripts** | Scripts that automate me out of doing actual work | `Python` `Bash` `Cron` |
